definitions.text: The part of something that faces out; the outer surface.
examples: He's repainting the outside of his house.

definitions.text: The external appearance of someone or something.
examples: Her outside was stern, but inside was a heart of gold.

definitions.text: The space beyond some limit or boundary.
examples: Viewed from the outside, the building seemed unremarkable.

definitions.text: Of or pertaining to the outer surface, limit or boundary.
Of, pertaining to or originating from beyond the outer surface, limit or boundary.
Away from the interior or center of something.
To or in the outdoors or outside; to or in an area that is beyond the scope, limits, or borders of a given place.
examples: Residents of the city rarely ventured outside.

definitions.text: On the outside of, not inside (something, such as a building).
Beyond the scope, limits, or borders of.
